title: Three Brothers, Standing Under the Clouds
overview: The three Kumoh brothers ferry criminals to the largest prison in Japan, Gokumonjo. One day, a criminal escapes en route to the prison…

title: Cutthroat, Sneering at the Clouds
overview: The day after the incident with the escaped criminal, Tenka heads to the clinic where he finds out that a murderer is heading toward Kumoh Shrine.

title: Second Son, Undercover in Prison
overview: Soramaru wants to be stronger so Tenka can rely on him, so he asks Sosei to train him. But Soramaru has to prove his worth first…

title: Fuma, Sneaking through the Prison Gate
overview: Soramaru meets a mysterious masked man in Gokumonjo and regains memories of the past. Meanwhile, Shirasu is on his way to rescue him…

title: Tenka, Shaken by Turmoil
overview: Soramaru brings the information from Gokumonjo to the Yamainu to try to make a deal with them while Tenka is home sick…

title: The Sun, Disappearing into the Clouds
overview: Soramaru and Chutaro discover the relationship between the Orochi and the Kumoh family and learn of the burden Tenka was carrying by himself…

title: Fleeting Laughter
overview: Six hundred years ago, Abe no Hirari met Botan and the predecessors of the Kumoh and Sasaki families and battled the Orochi of the Kamakura period…

title: Boys, Lamenting in the Rain
overview: The sun hides behind rainclouds as those Tenka left behind try to come to terms with his execution and continue on with their lives…

title: Successor, Standing under the Murky Sky
overview: While Kagami talks to Chutaro, Sosei investigates Gokumonjo. Meanwhile, Soramaru has been having trouble sleeping...

title: White Darkness, Turning Back
overview: Shirasu makes his true intentions known, and Soramaru faces what lies within him as Chutaro continues his journey with Kagami…

title: The Sun, Shining Again in the Clouds
overview: Tenka has reappeared, but he learns that his brothers are in trouble and goes after them. Meanwhile, the Yamainu go after the Orochi…

title: Brothers, Gathering Under the Sun
overview: The Kumoh brothers are finally reunited for the final battle against the Orochi and the Fuma…
